---
title: "lasso_model"
author: "Kellianne Ng"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load library
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(hdm)
```

## Load dataset
```{r}
df = read.csv("../data/final_data.csv")
df = df %>% mutate(caldt = ymd(caldt))
```

```{r}
fit_lasso_model <- function(full_df,
                            target_col = "alpha_ann",
                            fund_col = "crsp_fundno",
                            date_col = "caldt",
                            year_col = "evaluation_year") {
  
  # 1. Basic checks
  required_cols <- c(target_col, fund_col, date_col)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(full_df))
  
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  # 2. create evaluation_year
  df <- full_df %>%
    mutate(
      !!date_col := ymd(.data[[date_col]]),
      !!year_col := as.integer(format(.data[[date_col]], "%Y"))
    )
  
  pred_year = max(df[[year_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 3. Create squared terms
  exclude_from_square <- c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann", "evaluation_year")
  
  cols_to_square <- setdiff(names(df), exclude_from_square)
  cols_to_square <- cols_to_square[sapply(df[cols_to_square], is.numeric)]
  
  if (length(cols_to_square) > 0) {
    for (col in cols_to_square) {
      df[[paste0(col, "_sq")]] <- df[[col]]^2
    }
  }
  
  # 4. Split into training and prediction sets
  train_df <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[year_col]] < pred_year) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[target_col]])) %>%
    arrange(.data[[date_col]])
  
  test_df <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[year_col]] == pred_year) %>%
    arrange(.data[[date_col]])
  
  if (nrow(train_df) == 0) {
    stop("Training data is empty after filtering.")
  }
  
  if (nrow(test_df) == 0) {
    stop("Prediction year data is empty.")
  }
  
  # 5. Select predictor columns
  exclude_from_model <- c(target_col, fund_col, date_col, year_col)
  
  predictor_cols <- setdiff(names(train_df), exclude_from_model)
  predictor_cols <- predictor_cols[sapply(train_df[predictor_cols], is.numeric)]
  
  if (length(predictor_cols) == 0) {
    stop("No numeric predictor columns found.")
  }
  
  # 6. Build training and test matrices
  x_train <- train_df %>%
    select(all_of(predictor_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))
  
  x_test <- test_df %>%
    select(all_of(predictor_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))
  
  y_train <- train_df[[target_col]]
  
  # 7. Fill missing values using training medians
  train_medians <- sapply(x_train, function(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  for (j in seq_along(x_train)) {
    x_train[[j]][is.na(x_train[[j]])] <- train_medians[j]
    x_test[[j]][is.na(x_test[[j]])] <- train_medians[j]
  }
  
  # 8. Drop zero-variance columns based on training data
  keep_cols <- sapply(x_train, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
  
  x_train <- x_train[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]
  x_test <- x_test[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 9. Fit plug-in Lasso
  lasso_fit <- rlasso(
    x = as.matrix(x_train),
    y = y_train,
    post = FALSE
  )
  
  # 10. Predict for all funds in prediction_year
  predicted_alpha <- as.numeric(
    predict(lasso_fit, newdata = as.matrix(x_test))
  )
  
  # 11. Return required output
  pred_df <- test_df %>%
    transmute(
      evaluation_year = .data[[year_col]],
      crsp_fundno = .data[[fund_col]],
      predicted_alpha = predicted_alpha
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(predicted_alpha))
  
  return(pred_df)
}
```
